_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6 inhibition enhances SHP2 inhibitor efficacy and is dependent upon RB function in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors

details: JH-2-079c used in both in vitro and in vivo settings; classified as partially sensitive (PS) to TNO155 (SHP2i) in vivo; TNO155 + ribociclib (CDK4/6i) combination outperformed either single agent; in vitro TNO155 reduced pRB, cyclin D1, and pCDK4(T172), and combination markedly decreased survivin/BIRC5 and claspin/CLSPN; 3D microtissue ex vivo assay also performed on PDX-derived material
